ns0:entry.ns0:title: Infrasys-AI/AIInfra
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Infrasys-AI/AIInfra
Language: jupyter-notebook
AIInfra（AI 基础设施）指AI系统从底层芯片等硬件，到上层软件栈支持AI大模型训练和推理。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Infrasys-AI/AISystem
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Infrasys-AI/AISystem
Language: jupyter-notebook
AISystem 主要是指AI系统，包括AI芯片、AI编译器、AI推理和训练框架等AI全栈底层技术

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Lordog/dive-into-llms
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Lordog/dive-into-llms
Language: jupyter-notebook
《动手学大模型Dive into LLMs》系列编程实践教程

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA-NeMo/Nemotron
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/Nemotron
Language: jupyter-notebook
Developer Asset Hub for NVIDIA Nemotron — A one-stop resource for training recipes, usage cookbooks, datasets, and full end-to-end reference examples to build with Nemotron models

ns0:entry.ns0:title: UFund-Me/Qbot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/UFund-Me/Qbot
Language: jupyter-notebook
[🔥updating ...] AI 自动量化交易机器人(完全本地部署) AI-powered Quantitative Investment Research Platform. 📃 online docs: https://ufund-me.github.io/Qbot ✨ :news: qbot-mini: https://github.com/Charmve/iQuant

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/claude-cookbooks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-cookbooks
Language: jupyter-notebook
A collection of notebooks/recipes showcasing some fun and effective ways of using Claude.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: datawhalechina/whale-quant
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/datawhalechina/whale-quant
Language: jupyter-notebook
本项目为量化开源课程，可以帮助人们快速掌握量化金融知识以及使用Python进行量化开发的能力。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: duoan/TorchCode
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/duoan/TorchCode
Language: jupyter-notebook
🔥 LeetCode for PyTorch — practice implementing softmax, attention, GPT-2 and more from scratch with instant auto-grading. Jupyter-based, self-hosted or try online.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ed-donner/agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ed-donner/agents
Language: jupyter-notebook
Repo for the Complete Agentic AI Engineering Course

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/sam2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/sam2
Language: jupyter-notebook
The repository provides code for running inference with the Meta Segment Anything Model 2 (SAM 2), links for downloading the trained model checkpoints, and example notebooks that show how to use the model.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: karpathy/micrograd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/karpathy/micrograd
Language: jupyter-notebook
A tiny scalar-valued autograd engine and a neural net library on top of it with PyTorch-like API

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/AI-For-Beginners
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/AI-For-Beginners
Language: jupyter-notebook
12 Weeks, 24 Lessons, AI for All!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/generative-ai-for-beginners
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/generative-ai-for-beginners
Language: jupyter-notebook
21 Lessons, Get Started Building with Generative AI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mrdbourke/zero-to-mastery-ml
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mrdbourke/zero-to-mastery-ml
Language: jupyter-notebook
All course materials for the Zero to Mastery Machine Learning and Data Science course.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: oracle-devrel/oracle-ai-developer-hub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/oracle-devrel/oracle-ai-developer-hub
Language: jupyter-notebook
Technical resources for AI developers to build applications, agents, and systems using Oracle AI Database and OCI services
